{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Striker Trial targets
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The targets in the [[Striker Trial]] are black blobs floating behind a hazy wall of [[aura]] that re-form if cut.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
